claim_boundary: Tier 7.0h is software public-benchmark mechanism evidence only. It tests a bounded nonlinear recurrent continuous-state/interface candidate against v2.2, public baselines, and shams. It is not hardware evidence, not native on-chip recurrence, not a baseline freeze, and not AGI/ASI evidence.

classification.claim: bounded nonlinear recurrent continuous-state candidate improved public scoreboard versus v2.2
nonclaims: not sleep/replay, lifecycle, planning, language, AGI, or ASI
classification.recommendation: Do not freeze yet; run topology-specificity repair/gate before promoting bounded nonlinear recurrence.

criteria.name: no baseline freeze authorized by this tier

fairness_contract.custom_task_policy: no private synthetic tasks in this runner
fairness_contract.finite_stream_policy: all generated task streams must be finite; 8000 is the largest original-seed finite length from Tier 7.0f
fairness_contract.hardware_policy: blocked until software usefulness and compact regression earn transfer
fairness_contract.readout_policy: online normalized LMS prediction-before-update for candidate/v2.2/controls; ESN keeps train-prefix ridge baseline role

tier: Tier 7.0h - Bounded Nonlinear Recurrent Continuous-State / Interface Gate
